sn23.14:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Sitting to one side, the Venerable Radha said to the Blessed One: "Venerable sir, it is said, ‘of an impermanent nature, of an impermanent nature.’ What now, venerable sir, is of an impermanent nature?"
sn23.14:1.2: "Form, Radha, is of an impermanent nature. Feeling … sn.iii.196 Perception … Volitional formations … Consciousness is of an impermanent nature. Seeing thus … He understands: ’ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
